## BuiltIn.BuiltInData.getLibraryTree() method

Gets the full built-in library tree. The tree is structured to mirror a real filesystem library:

```
/
└── data/
    ├── ingredients/
    │   ├── common.json
    │   ├── felchlin.json
    │   ├── cacao-barry.json
    │   └── guittard.json
    ├── recipes/
    │   └── common.json
    ├── molds/
    │   └── common.json
    └── procedures/
        └── common.json
```

**Signature:**

```typescript
static getLibraryTree(): Result<FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem&gt;

`Success` with the library tree root directory, or `Failure` with an error message.
